CalculatorInvocationResponse.description: Standard wire shape for any calculator invocation response.
CalculatorInvocationResponse.title: CalculatorInvocationResponse

CalculatorListing.description: One entry in the calculator-discovery listing (GET /v1/calculators).
CalculatorListing.title: CalculatorListing

DepreciationAuditAssetInput.description:
One asset row in a depreciation-audit batch.

Mirrors the upstream Prolog handler's accepted shape
(`app/server/depreciation_server.pl::handle_audit`); fields are
atom-pure carriers of identity per CLAWDOG/110 §3.3.

assetId.description: Caller-supplied stable identifier for the asset row.
assetId.title: Assetid

assetName.description: Free-text asset description. Used by the Prolog Tier-1 classifier (keyword_map/2 + Stopwords.pl) to resolve effective-life category.
assetName.title: Assetname

currentBookAccumDep.description: Current ledger-side accumulated depreciation balance at the transition date (AUD). The audit compares this against the ideal-method projection to detect material variance.
currentBookAccumDep.title: Currentbookaccumdep

taxMethod.description: The depreciation method historically applied on the tax side. Common values: 'dv' (diminishing value), 'pc' (prime cost). Used by the engine to surface a method-flag warning when the accounting-side ideal differs from the tax-side recorded method.
taxMethod.title: Taxmethod

DepreciationAuditAssetInput.title: DepreciationAuditAssetInput

DepreciationAuditInput.description:
Input for the Depreciation Audit endpoint.

Wire-shape mirrors the upstream Prolog `/api/v1/depreciation/audit`
handler: a transition_date, a method discriminator, and an
`assets_to_audit` batch.

The `method` field is constrained to the accounting-engine scope per
Andrew (2026-05-12 05:54 UTC): prime cost + diminishing value only.
The engine's `normalize_method/2` accepts `'dvmethod'` for DV; legacy
aliases on input are coerced to canonical strings before forwarding.

assetsToAudit.description: Batch of asset rows to audit. The engine processes them sequentially; total runtime is dominated by Tier-1 classifier lookups (keyword_map/2).
assetsToAudit.title: Assetstoaudit

method.description: Accounting-side ideal method to project. 'primecost' = straight-line; 'dvmethod' = diminishing value. The engine default is 'primecost' (matches handle_audit fall-through).
method.title: Method

transitionDate.description: ISO-8601 date marking the audit anchor (e.g. 2025-07-01 = FY2026 opening). The engine projects accumulated depreciation to this date and compares against current_book_accum_dep.
transitionDate.title: Transitiondate

DepreciationAuditInput.title: DepreciationAuditInput

FBTCarOperatingCostInput.description:
Input for the FBT Car Operating Cost method (Phase 3a Cut A).

Field naming mirrors the upstream Prolog engine's request shape (snake_case
via FastAPI's alias mapping, accepting both snake_case and the camelCase
used by the existing fbt_tester.py compatibility surface).

acquisitionCost.description: Original acquisition cost (AUD) for the chained-DV walk; chained-DV entry-point. Mutually exclusive with opening_depreciated_value. When supplied with acquisition_date (and without opening_depreciated_value), the engine dispatches to the OT #81 chained-DV walk predicate (mc08).
acquisitionCost.title: Acquisitioncost

acquisitionDate.description: ISO date string (e.g. 2024-04-01); drives deemed-depreciation tier dispatch.
acquisitionDate.title: Acquisitiondate

businessUsePercentage.description: Business-use % of total operating costs. Clamped to [0, 100] by the engine.
businessUsePercentage.title: Businessusepercentage

daysHeldInFBTYear.description: Days the car was held during the FBT year [0..366]. Required for in-FY-acquisition chained-DV cases (acquisition_date within the FBT year) where the engine's default of 365 would over-state the partial-year leg. Multi-FY chains do NOT need this field (their FY2026 leg is always a full year).
daysHeldInFBTYear.title: Daysheldinfbtyear

employeeContribution.description: Post-tax employee contribution toward the benefit (AUD).
employeeContribution.title: Employeecontribution

formOfFinance.description: One of: owned | hire_purchase | leased | unspecified.
formOfFinance.title: Formoffinance

fuelRepairsServicing.description: Fuel + repairs + servicing for the period (AUD).
fuelRepairsServicing.title: Fuelrepairsservicing

leasePayments.description: Lease payments for the period (AUD); null/absent if not leased.
leasePayments.title: Leasepayments

openingDepreciatedValue.description: Opening depreciated value at start of FBT year (AUD). Mutually exclusive with acquisition_cost per engine Lesson #14 strict-validation (OT #81 Rung 2 mc07).
openingDepreciatedValue.title: Openingdepreciatedvalue

FBTCarOperatingCostInput.title: FBTCarOperatingCostInput

ManifestRateTableEntry.description: One entry in the manifest's ``rate_table_uris`` block (CLAWDOG/109 §7.1).
ManifestRateTableEntry.title: ManifestRateTableEntry

info.description:
**Architectural canon:** [CLAWDOG/109](https://github.com/futureWA/clawdog-brain/blob/master/GLOBAL_NOTES/CLAWDOG/109_CALCULATOR_CONSTELLATION.md)

**Outsource-boundary canon:** [CLAWDOG/110](https://github.com/futureWA/clawdog-brain/blob/master/GLOBAL_NOTES/CLAWDOG/110_OUTSOURCE_BOUNDARY_DISCIPLINE.md)

Phase 3a wires a single calculator (FBT Car Operating Cost). Phase 3c is the second-instance test of whether the abstraction holds.
info.summary: Phase 3a Egress Interface over the LodgeiT calculator pool. Implements the REST surface of CLAWDOG/109's tri-surface exposure model. Governed by CLAWDOG/110's five non-negotiables (manifest-fidelity, advisory-boundary, atom-vs-bridge, OpenAPI drift, Standing Rule #1).
info.title: ClawDog Calculator-Constellation REST API

get.description:
Return a minimal liveness response for the Cloud Run / Docker HEALTHCHECK.

Does NOT call into the upstream Prolog engine — that would couple the
REST liveness signal to the engine's readiness, which is a deliberately
independent dimension.

Return a manifest of the calculators wired into this Phase 3a deployment.

Phase 3a hardcodes one entry (FBT Car Operating Cost). Phase 3c onboards a
second calculator; the registry above grows but the route signature does not.

schema.title: Response List Calculators V1 Calculators Get

get.summary: List calculators available through the REST surface.

post.description: Phase 3c.3.B — onboards the upstream Depreciation Prolog engine's `/api/v1/depreciation/audit` endpoint through the REST surface. Cross-checks ledger-side `current_book_accum_dep` against the accounting-method projection (prime cost or diminishing value) at the supplied `transition_date`; surfaces a variance flag against the Brain-canon variance threshold (SBRM_RATE_TABLE/depreciation/<taxonomy>/<period>/audit-variance-threshold.md). Out of scope for β.2.B: `/resurrect` (asset register migration) and `/adjustment_journal` (Phase II pipeline) — each will land as a sibling route at the next depreciation onboarding rung.

parameters.description: Bare-atom taxonomy axis value per CLAWDOG/111 §2. Ratified set: lodgeit_au_sbrm | hoffman_base. At Phase 3c.3.B only lodgeit_au_sbrm is populated for depreciation; hoffman_base bundle authoring is deferred.
parameters.name: taxonomy

schema.description: Bare-atom taxonomy axis value per CLAWDOG/111 §2. Ratified set: lodgeit_au_sbrm | hoffman_base. At Phase 3c.3.B only lodgeit_au_sbrm is populated for depreciation; hoffman_base bundle authoring is deferred.
schema.title: Taxonomy
Response Invoke Depreciation Audit V1 Calculators Depreciation Audit  Period Uri  Post

post.summary: Invoke the Depreciation Audit endpoint for the given URN-encoded period.

post.description: Phase 3a Cut A — bare math + manifest + advisory. URL-encoded URN path params; the bridge re-validates them against the atom-vs-bridge boundary (CLAWDOG/110 §3.3) before forwarding to the Prolog engine. Response carries the calculator's native trace block, plus the manifest-fidelity block (live content_hashes per CLAWDOG/109 §7) and the advisory block (CLAWDOG/109 §6 / CLAWDOG/110 §3.2).

parameters.description: Bare-atom taxonomy axis value per CLAWDOG/111 §2. Ratified set: lodgeit_au_sbrm | hoffman_base. Default at Phase 3c.2: lodgeit_au_sbrm (only populated bundle). Strict-required discipline tightens at Phase 3c.3 when hoffman_base populates.
parameters.name: taxonomy

schema.description: Bare-atom taxonomy axis value per CLAWDOG/111 §2. Ratified set: lodgeit_au_sbrm | hoffman_base. Default at Phase 3c.2: lodgeit_au_sbrm (only populated bundle). Strict-required discipline tightens at Phase 3c.3 when hoffman_base populates.
schema.title: Taxonomy

post.summary: Invoke a calculator for the given URN-encoded period.
